title: poa smithii
intro: Poa smithii, also known as blue grass or blue poa, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of certain alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Poa smithii are said to include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
